# **Model Card Template — Short-Form Audio Predictor**

## **Model purpose**

Predict short-form audio impact on retention, replay, sharing, saving, and audio lift.

## **Inputs**

```text
audio features
visual features
caption/transcript features
metadata
platform metrics
```

## **Outputs**

```text
predicted 3s retention
predicted completion
predicted replay rate
predicted share rate
predicted save rate
predicted audio lift
risk-adjusted publish/regenerate decision
```

## **Training data**

Describe:

```text
platforms
creators
formats
time range
number of clips
number of audio variants
```

## **Limitations**

```text
algorithm changes
audience drift
confounding from topic/visual quality
small-sample uncertainty
platform metric noise
synthetic media policy changes
```

## **Safety and rights constraints**

```text
copyright risk
voice consent
synthetic disclosure
brand safety
platform rules
```
